prompt: Create src/domains/ui/menu_screen.rs and add 'pub mod menu_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register MenuScreenPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/shared/mod.rs for MenuScreen enum (Party, Equipment, Djinn, Items, Psynergy, Status, QuestLog). Read src/domains/ui/app_state.rs — add AppState::Menu variant and CurrentMenu(MenuScreen) resource. Read src/domains/menu/mod.rs for menu formatting logic. Read src/domains/equipment/mod.rs for EquipmentLoadout, compute_equipment_effects. Read src/domains/djinn/mod.rs for DjinnSlots. Read src/domains/quest/mod.rs for QuestManager. Read SaveDataRes for player_party, inventory, team_djinn. Create MenuScreenPlugin with 7 sub-screens in one file: (1) PARTY: list party members with name, level, HP, element. (2) EQUIPMENT: per-unit equipment slots (weapon/armor) with stat bonuses. (3) DJINN: team djinn list with names and states. (4) ITEMS: inventory list with item names. (5) PSYNERGY: per-unit learned abilities with PP cost and power. (6) STATUS: gold, XP, play time, party size. (7) QUEST LOG: active quests with current stage. Tab buttons across top to switch between sub-screens. Back button returns to previous AppState (WorldMap or Town). All read-only display — no equip/use actions needed for Wave C. Use JRPG panel styling. OnExit despawn_screen. Run cargo check. Commit.

Create src/domains/ui/save_load_screen.rs and add 'pub mod save_load_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register SaveLoadPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/domains/ui/app_state.rs — add AppState::SaveLoad variant. Read src/domains/save/mod.rs for SaveData, save_game(), load_game(), create_new_game(). For WASM: use web_sys localStorage — #[cfg(target_arch = wasm32)] serialize SaveData to JSON string, store with key 'vale-village-save'. For native: use saves/game.ron path. Create SaveLoadPlugin: OnEnter shows panel with Save button and Load button. Save: serialize current SaveDataRes + GameStateRes state, write to storage, show 'Saved!' confirmation. Load: read from storage, deserialize, update SaveDataRes + GameStateRes, transition to WorldMap. Show save info if exists (gold, level, encounters completed). Back button returns to previous state. OnExit despawn_screen. WASM needs web-sys dep — add to Cargo.toml: web-sys = { version = '0.3', features = ['Storage', 'Window'] } with target cfg. Run cargo check. Commit.
